title: mananthes microdonta
intro: Mananthes microdonta, also known as the coral bush or coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Asia, known for its vibrant red, pink, or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mananthes microdonta include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
